name: Death Spells
description: '''Death Spells''' was an American [[digital hardcore]] band formed in 2012. The group was composed of vocalist [[Frank Iero]], rhythm guitarist of My Chemical Romance, and keyboardist [[James Dewees]], formerly of [[The Get Up Kids]] and [[Reggie and the Full Effect]]. Both Iero and Dewees were also previously members of [[hardcore punk]] band [[Leathermouth]].
